lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਨਰ ਇਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: re nar in bidh paar paraae |
lines.english: O man, in this way, you shall cross over to the other side.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਅਵਖਧੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਨਾ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਕਟ ਜੋਨਿ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥੫॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur mantru avakhadh naam deenaa jan naanak sankatt jon na paae |5|2|
lines.english: One who is blessed with the medicine of the GurMantra, the Name of the Lord, O servant Nanak, does not suffer the agonies of reincarnation. ||5||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਿਆਇ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਹੋਇ ਮਿਰਤਕੁ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੨॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: dhiaae har jeeo hoe miratak tiaag doojaa bhaau | rahaau doojaa |2|11|
lines.english: Meditate on your Dear Lord, and be dead to the world; renounce your love of duality. ||Second Pause||2||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਭਉ ਅਚਰਜ ਰੂਪੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪੇਖਿਆ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਨ ਕਤਹੂ ਜਾਇਆ ਥਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anbhau acharaj roop prabh pekhiaa meraa man chhodd na katahoo jaaeaa thaa |1|
lines.english: I have seen God, fearless, of wondrous beauty; my mind shall never leave Him to go anywhere else. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹਰਿ ਢੂਢਨ ਤੇ ਛੂਟਿ ਪਰੇ ਗੁਰਿ ਘਰ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: baahar dtoodtan te chhoott pare gur ghar hee maeh dikhaaeaa thaa |
lines.english: I have quit searching outside; the Guru has shown me that God is within the home of my own heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨਕੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਰੇ ਪਾਇਓ ਹਰਿ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: maanak paaeo re paaeo har pooraa paaeaa thaa |
lines.english: I have found the jewel; I have found the Perfect Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਲਿ ਅਮੋਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਈ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਗੁਰੂ ਦਿਵਾਇਆ ਥਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mol amol na paaeaa jaaee kar kirapaa guroo divaaeaa thaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The invaluable value cannot be obtained; in His Mercy, the Guru bestows it. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਦਿਸਟੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਅਕਥੁ ਕਥਾਇਆ ਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: adisatt agochar paarabraham mil saadhoo akath kathaaeaa thaa |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God is imperceptible and unfathomable; meeting the Holy Saint, I speak the Unspoken Speech.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਹਦ ਸਬਦੁ ਦਸਮ ਦੁਆਰਿ ਵਜਿਓ ਤਹ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਚੁਆਇਆ ਥਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: anahad sabad dasam duaar vajio teh amrit naam chuaaeaa thaa |2|
lines.english: The unstruck sound current of the Shabad vibrates and resounds in the Tenth Gate; the Ambrosial Naam trickles down there. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਚਰਣ ਚਰਣ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਅਘੜੁ ਘੜਿਓ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਥਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: charan charan charan gur seve agharr gharrio ras paaeaa thaa |3|
lines.english: I serve the feet, the feet, the feet of the Guru, and manage the unmanageable. I have found the juice, the sublime essence. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੋਟਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਮਨਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਬੂਝੀ ਅਖੁਟ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਸਮਾਇਆ ਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: tott naahee man trisanaa boojhee akhutt bhanddaar samaaeaa thaa |
lines.english: I lack nothing; the thirsty desires of my mind are satisfied. The inexhaustible treasure has entered into my being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਆਵਾ ਸਹਜੇ ਜਾਵਾ ਸਹਜੇ ਮਨੁ ਖੇਲਾਇਆ ਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje aavaa sahaje jaavaa sahaje man khelaaeaa thaa |
lines.english: Intuitively I come, and intuively I go; my mind intuitively plays.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਭਰਮੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਖੋਇਆ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਮਹਲੀ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਥਾ ॥੪॥੩॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak bharam gur khoeaa taa har mahalee mehal paaeaa thaa |4|3|12|
lines.english: Says Nanak, when the Guru drives out doubt, then the soul-bride enters the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. ||4||3||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸਹਿ ਸਾਜਿ ਨਿਵਾਜਿਆ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਸਿਉ ਰੁਚ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jiseh saaj nivaajiaa tiseh siau ruch naeh |
lines.english: You feel no love for the One who created and embellished you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਰੂਤੀ ਆਨ ਬੋਈਐ ਫਲੁ ਨ ਫੂਲੈ ਤਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aan rootee aan boeeai fal na foolai taeh |1|
lines.english: The seed, planted out season, does not germinate; it does not produce flower or fruit. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਵਤ੍ਰ ਬੀਜਣ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: re man vatr beejan naau |
lines.english: O mind, this is the time to plant the seed of the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਇ ਖੇਤੀ ਲਾਇ ਮਨੂਆ ਭਲੋ ਸਮਉ ਸੁਆਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: boe khetee laae manooaa bhalo smau suaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Focus your mind, and cultivate this crop; at the proper time, make this your purpose. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਇ ਖਹੜਾ ਭਰਮੁ ਮਨ ਕਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਰਣੀ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khoe khaharraa bharam man kaa satigur saranee jaae |
lines.english: Eradicate the stubbornness and doubt of your mind, and go to the Sanctuary of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਉ ਲਾਗਾ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਸਿਉ ਘਾਲ ਪਾਈ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaau laagaa gobid siau ghaal paaee thaae |
lines.english: He falls in love with the Lord of the Universe, and his efforts are approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੁ ਜਿਸ ਕਉ ਧੁਰਹੁ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੋਈ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: karam jis kau dhurahu likhiaa soee kaar kamaae |2|
lines.english: He alone does such deeds, who has such pre-ordained karma. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਇਆ ਅਮੋਲੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੋ ਛੋਡਿ ਨ ਕਤਹੂ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: paaeaa amol padaaratho chhodd na katahoo jaae |
lines.english: I have obtained the priceless wealth, which shall never leave me or go anywhere else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਤਿ ਮੇਰੈ ਜੰਮਿਆ ਨਿਖੁਟਿ ਨ ਕਬਹੂ ਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: khet merai jamiaa nikhutt na kabahoo jaae |3|
lines.english: My crop has germinated, and it shall never be used up. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਰਹੇ ਆਘਾਇ ॥੪॥੪॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak sukh paaeaa tripat rahe aaghaae |4|4|13|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I have found peace; I am satisfied and fulfilled. ||4||4||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੂਟੋ ਆਂਡਾ ਭਰਮ ਕਾ ਮਨਹਿ ਭਇਓ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: footto aanddaa bharam kaa maneh bheo paragaas |
lines.english: The egg of doubt has burst; my mind has been enlightened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਟੀ ਬੇਰੀ ਪਗਹ ਤੇ ਗੁਰਿ ਕੀਨੀ ਬੰਦਿ ਖਲਾਸੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaattee beree pagah te gur keenee band khalaas |1|
lines.english: The Guru has shattered the shackles on my feet, and has set me free. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੁ ਰਹਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaan rahio |
lines.english: My coming and going in reincarnation is ended.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਪਤ ਕੜਾਹਾ ਬੁਝਿ ਗਇਆ ਗੁਰਿ ਸੀਤਲ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tapat karraahaa bujh geaa gur seetal naam deeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The boiling cauldron has cooled down; the Guru has blessed me with the cooling, soothing Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੀ ਅਟਕ ਤਿਸ ਤੇ ਛੁਟੀ ਤਉ ਕਹਾ ਕਰੈ ਕੋਟਵਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis kee attak tis te chhuttee tau kahaa karai kottavaar |2|
lines.english: The one who tied me up, has released me; what can the Watchman of Death do to me now? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਤੇ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗੁ ਭਇਆ ਤਉ ਛੋਡਿ ਗਏ ਨਿਗਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jab te saadhoo sang bheaa tau chhodd ge nigahaar |
lines.english: Since I joined the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, those who were eyeing me have left.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੂਕਾ ਭਾਰਾ ਕਰਮ ਕਾ ਹੋਏ ਨਿਹਕਰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: chookaa bhaaraa karam kaa hoe nihakaramaa |
lines.english: The load of my karma has been removed, and I am now free of karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਗਰ ਤੇ ਕੰਢੈ ਚੜੇ ਗੁਰਿ ਕੀਨੇ ਧਰਮਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saagar te kandtai charre gur keene dharamaa |3|
lines.english: I have crossed the world-ocean, and reached the other shore; the Guru has blessed me with this Dharma. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਥਾਨੁ ਸਚੁ ਬੈਠਕਾ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਆਉ ਬਣਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sach thaan sach baitthakaa sach suaau banaaeaa |
lines.english: True is my place, and True is my seat; I have made Truth my life's purpose.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਪੂੰਜੀ ਸਚੁ ਵਖਰੋ ਨਾਨਕ ਘਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੫॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: sach poonjee sach vakharo naanak ghar paaeaa |4|5|14|
lines.english: True is my capital, and True is the merchandise, which Nanak has placed into the home of the heart. ||4||5||14||
